flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Barton County Community College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (69.3% → 52.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Barton County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Barton County Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 2.5k).
